case_title: WENDY CHAN et al VS. WESLEY LI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, WENDY WEIL, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, WESLEY $1,890.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,044.50, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 BY NOT PROVIDING AN ITEMIZED LIST OF DEDUCTIONS WITHIN 21 DAYS OF MOVE OUT. MINI MINUTES: 9:16am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk-Beth Wilber, Nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Appellant, Wesley Li, appears in Pro Per; Respondents, Wendy Chan and Paul Weil, appear in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from the Judge.
